name: Jimmy Greene
abstract: James Sidney Greene Jr. (born February 24, 1975) is an American jazz saxophonist, gospel musician, recording artist, record producer, and music professor.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Davis
about_quotes.evidence: People like Dezron Douglas, the bassist who’s playing with everybody. Jimmy Greene, the great tenor saxophonist.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, December 15, 2017

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: Abraham [Burton] comes in, and so does Jimmy Greene and [?Waynus Goffrey?] and all the different young players... All of them, they come back.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
